reviews.review_title: Best game I played in a long time.
reviews.review_description: This game is so cool I love how you can battle other monster, grow big and throw the tiny monsters into space. It’s really funny. 5 stars! The community is also really nice. Can’t wait for the future updates of this game it’s gonna be so much fun! HIGLY recommend!

developer_response.body:
WOOO!! ⚡💥
So glad you’re loving it — smashing, growing huge, and pure chaos!
Thanks for the 5 stars!

If you’re having fun, please tell all your friends to jump in too!

And if you want to make new friends and smash together, come hang out with us on Discord 👉 https://discord.gg/gpcPrZUGup

reviews.review_description: I like how u can eat other people

reviews.review_title: Best game I've played in a while!
reviews.review_description: i played all 4 beta tested and i love this game so much, the seven and community are nice.

developer_response.body:
WOOOO! Love to hear this MICKYDULOVEN !! ⚡

Huge shoutout for sticking with us across all four betas — that kind of support means everything.
Buzzing that you're loving the game and feeling the good vibes from the community too.

See you in the game — let's keep smashing!! 🚀💥

reviews.review_description: Great game my kids love it and we had a blast playing together.  Very fun would definitely recommend trying this game loads of fun !!!

developer_response.body:
WOOOO! ⚡
Love hearing this — so glad you and the kids had a blast together!
Nothing better than smashing, eating, and laughing as a squad. ❤️

Thanks for the amazing review and the recommendation — means the world.
See you all back in the arena!! 💥👾

reviews.review_description: Every time I play it never loads. It literally takes an eternity to load. The mast game experience i got was when I was in the lobby. So do nat play this game.

developer_response.body:
Sorry to hear this — that sounds really frustrating 😞
A small number of players have mentioned this loading bug, and in almost all cases a full restart of the headset fixed it for them 👍

We're working on a proper fix right now so the game loads fast every time. Please try a restart and let us know if it helps: SmashEatGrow@xrgames.io

We want to get you back in and smashing monsters again ASAP! 👾💥

Hey kingman5!

Thanks so much for downloading the game. Quick tip on eating:

Press the grip button to grab a small item → bring it to your mouth → then release the grip button. That should chomp it!

Here’s a quick How-to-Play short too:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0dLqmmITQ7M

Let me know if that fixes it — happy to help anytime. You can also email me directly at bobby.thandi@xrgames.io

And if it does resolve the issue, it'd mean a lot if you could revisit your review.

Thanks again!
